documents.title: GWAS Analysis Protocol
documents.description: Genome-wide association study interpretation: LD clumping, fine-mapping, credible sets, variant-to-gene mapping, candidate gene prioritization, and cross-trait analysis.

documents.title: Drug Repurposing Protocol
documents.description: Systematic drug repurposing: target identification, compound search in ChEMBL, binding analysis, ADMET assessment, clinical evidence mining, and repurposing prioritization.

documents.title: Gene-Disease Association Protocol
documents.description: Gene-disease association evaluation: evidence hierarchy from Mendelian to complex disease, OMIM/ClinGen curation, convergence scoring, and causal inference.

documents.title: Pathway Analysis Protocol
documents.description: Biological pathway enrichment analysis: ORA, GSEA, network topology metrics, cross-pathway interactions, and therapeutic target identification from pathway networks.

documents.title: Protein Function Analysis Protocol
documents.description: Protein functional characterization: domain analysis, conservation scoring, structure prediction (AlphaFold/ESMFold), interaction networks, and variant impact assessment.

documents.title: Clinical Trial Analysis Protocol
documents.description: Clinical trial interpretation: phase classification, endpoint analysis, statistical assessment, safety evaluation, and failure analysis for terminated trials.

documents.title: Variant Interpretation Protocol
documents.description: Clinical variant classification: ACMG/AMP guidelines, pathogenicity scoring with CADD/REVEL/SpliceAI, population frequency assessment, and functional evidence evaluation.

documents.title: Sequence Analysis Protocol
documents.description: Biological sequence analysis: alignment (BLAST, MAFFT), motif discovery, homology search, phylogenetics, primer design, and codon optimization.

documents.title: Pandas Bio Data Recipes
documents.description: Common pandas patterns for biological data: gene expression matrices, GWAS summary statistics, differential expression, variant frequency tables, clinical survival data.

documents.title: BioPython Recipes
documents.description: BioPython patterns: sequence manipulation, FASTA/GenBank parsing, BLAST execution, multiple sequence alignment, Entrez database queries, PDB structure retrieval.

documents.title: NetworkX Graph Analysis Recipes
documents.description: NetworkX patterns for biological networks: protein interaction graphs, centrality analysis, community detection, shortest paths, pathway graph operations, Cytoscape export.

documents.title: RDKit Chemistry Recipes
documents.description: RDKit patterns: molecule creation from SMILES, Lipinski properties, fingerprints, Tanimoto similarity, PAINS filtering, scaffold analysis, 3D conformer generation.
